testcase.name: test_list_products

failure.message: AssertionError: No products key in response assert 'products' in [{'barcode': None, 'business_id': None, 'category_id': '69949327e6fea573b59e362d', 'category_name': 'Electronics', ...}, {'barcode': None, 'business_id': None, 'category_id': '69949327e6fea573b59e362d', 'category_name': 'Electronics', ...}, {'barcode': None, 'business_id': None, 'category_id': '69949327e6fea573b59e362d', 'category_name': 'Electronics', ...}, {'barcode': None, 'business_id': None, 'category_id': '69949327e6fea573b59e362d', 'category_name': 'Electronics', ...}, {'barcode': None, 'business_id': None, 'category_id': '69949327e6fea573b59e362e', 'category_name': 'Clothing', ...}, {'barcode': None, 'business_id': None, 'category_id': '69949327e6fea573b59e362e', 'category_name': 'Clothing', ...}, ...]

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_retailpro_apis.py:105: in test_list_products assert "products" in data, "No products key in response" E AssertionError: No products key in response E assert 'products' in [{'barcode': None, 'business_id': None, 'category_id': '69949327e6fea573b59e362d', 'category_name': 'Electronics', ...}, {'barcode': None, 'business_id': None, 'category_id': '69949327e6fea573b59e362d', 'category_name': 'Electronics', ...}, {'barcode': None, 'business_id': None, 'category_id': '69949327e6fea573b59e362d', 'category_name': 'Electronics', ...}, {'barcode': None, 'business_id': None, 'category_id': '69949327e6fea573b59e362d', 'category_name': 'Electronics', ...}, {'barcode': None, 'business_id': None, 'category_id': '69949327e6fea573b59e362e', 'category_name': 'Clothing', ...}, {'barcode': None, 'business_id': None, 'category_id': '69949327e6fea573b59e362e', 'category_name': 'Clothing', ...}, ...]

testcase.name: test_list_products_with_filters
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_retailpro_apis.py:119: in test_list_products_with_filters assert len(data.get("products", [])) <= 5 ^^^^^^^^ E AttributeError: 'list' object has no attribute 'get'

testcase.name: test_list_categories
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_retailpro_apis.py:135: in test_list_categories assert response.status_code == 200, f"List categories failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: List categories failed: {"detail":"Not Found"} E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_categories_structure
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_retailpro_apis.py:144: in test_categories_structure assert response.status_code == 200 E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_list_customers

failure.message: AssertionError: No customers key in response assert 'customers' in [{'address': '123 Main St, Dar es Salaam', 'birthday': None, 'business_id': None, 'company_id': None, ...}, {'address': '456 Oak Ave, Arusha', 'birthday': None, 'business_id': None, 'company_id': None, ...}, {'address': '789 Pine Rd, Mwanza', 'birthday': None, 'business_id': None, 'company_id': None, ...}, {'address': '321 Elm St, Dodoma', 'birthday': None, 'business_id': None, 'company_id': None, ...}, {'address': '654 Cedar Ln, Zanzibar', 'birthday': None, 'business_id': None, 'company_id': None, ...}, {'address': '987 Birch Dr, Morogoro', 'birthday': None, 'business_id': None, 'company_id': None, ...}, ...]

failure.message: AssertionError: No orders key in response assert 'orders' in [{'amount_due': 0.0, 'amount_paid': 3799.97, 'business_id': None, 'created_at': '2026-02-17T16:46:49.381000', ...}, {'amount_due': 0.0, 'amount_paid': 256.93, 'business_id': None, 'created_at': '2026-02-17T16:46:49.243000', ...}, {'amount_due': 0.0, 'amount_paid': 1549.98, 'business_id': None, 'created_at': '2026-02-17T16:46:49.116000', ...}, {'amount_due': 0.0, 'amount_paid': 107.88, 'business_id': None, 'created_at': '2026-02-17T16:46:48.912000', ...}, {'amount_due': 0.0, 'amount_paid': 299.95, 'business_id': None, 'created_at': '2026-02-17T16:46:48.723000', ...}, {'amount_due': 0.0, 'amount_paid': 1547.96, 'business_id': None, 'created_at': '2026-02-17T16:46:48.568000', ...}, ...]
